zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Phillippa Carminowe於從1508年到1519年出生在英國可瓦爾特魯羅時，她的父親Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe49歲，母親Catherine Wolvedon49歲。她於1517年與Sir James Trewinnard of Arwenack在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1563年8月9日在英國可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾，埋葬在英國可瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Phillippa Carminowe于从1508年到1519年出生在英国可瓦爾特魯羅时，她的父亲Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe49岁，母亲Catherine Wolvedon49岁。她于1517年与Sir James Trewinnard of Arwenack在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1563年8月9日在英国可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾，埋葬在英国可瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Phillippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Phillippa Carminowe was born from 1508 to 1519, in Truro, Cornwall, England, her father, Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe, was 49 and her mother, Catherine Wolvedon, was 49. She married Sir James Trewinnard of Arwenack in 1517, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 9 August 1563, in Boscastle, Cornwall, England, and was buried in Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Phillippa Carminowe est née du 1508 au 1519, à Truro, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Catherine Wolvedon, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Trewinnard of Arwenack en 1517, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 août 1563, à Boscastle, Cornouailles, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Phillippa Carminowe von 1508 bis 1519 in Truro, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe 49 und ihre Mutter Catherine Wolvedon 49. Sie hat 1517 in England, United Kingdom Sir James Trewinnard of Arwenack geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. August 1563 in Boscastle, Cornwall, England und wurde in Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Phillippa Carminowe è nata il da 1508 a 1519 nel Truro, Cornwall, England, sua padre, Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Catherine Wolvedon, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Trewinnard of Arwenack nel 1517, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 agosto 1563, nel Boscastle, Cornwall, England, e fu sepolta a Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Phillippa Carminoweがから1508年まで1519年にイギリスコルンワルトルロで生まれた時，父Nicholas Trewynnard Carminoweは49歳，母Catherine Wolvedonは49歳であった。1517年にイギリスイギリスでSir James Trewinnard of Arwenackと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1563年8月9日にイギリスコルンワルボスカストルで死去し，イギリスコルンワルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Phillippa Carminowe(이)가 1508년 부터 1519년 까지 영국 코른월 트루로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Wolvedon(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1517년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir James Trewinnard of Arwenack(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1563년 8월 9일 영국 코른월 보스카스틀에서 사망했으며 영국 코른월에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Phillippa Carminowe nasceu de 1508 a 1519, em Truro, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Wolvedon, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Trewinnard of Arwenack em 1517, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1563, em Boscastle, Cornwall, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Phillippa Carminowe родилась с 1508 по 1519 в местности труро, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Wolvedon, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Trewinnard of Arwenack в 1517 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 9 августа 1563 г. в местности боскастл, корнвалл, Англия и была похоронена в местности корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Phillippa Carminowe nació desde 1508 hasta 1519, en Truro, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Trewynnard Carminowe, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Catherine Wolvedon, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Sir James Trewinnard of Arwenack en 1517, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1563, en Boscastle, Cornwall, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Cornwall, Inglaterra.
